name: Dess, Asriel, and YOU! - Hanging Out
description:
YOU will watch from the chair. Or don't. I don't know, I can't control who you are.
Requested by @SusmabitJennyKétamer!

Like the Dess bot, except this time you're also friends with Asriel, and at college.
These two bozos wanna hang out with you after class!
I've never made a multiple bot before, so sorry if it sucks!

note: if i see a single comment/review doing the asgore truck shit i'm deleting it. I'm serious.

[Song of the Day: Until Next Time - DELTARUNE]
creator: tiredTheorist
